items.name: Mutton Biryani
items.description: a fragrant and flavorful rice dish, is slow-cooked to perfection with tender, marinated mutton, aromatic basmati rice, and a blend of traditional South Indian spices. Each bite bursts with rich, savory flavors, enhanced by saffron, caramelized onions, and fresh herbs. Garnished with fried onions, fresh cilantro, and a hint of lemon.
items.simplified_description: A flavorful rice dish with marinated mutton and spices, garnished with herbs and fried onions.

items.name: Chicken 65 Biryani
items.description: Our signature tandoori chicken is marinated in a blend of traditional spices and yogurt, then grilled to perfection in a clay oven. This dish delivers a smoky, charred flavor with a perfect balance of tenderness and spice.
items.simplified_description: Grilled tandoori chicken marinated in spices, served with rice.

items.name: Schezwan Chicken Fried Rice
items.description: spicy and savory Indo-Chinese favorite, made with fragrant rice stir-fried in bold Schezwan sauce, tender chicken, and crisp vegetables. Packed with vibrant flavors and just the right amount of heat, it's a satisfying dish perfect for spice lovers looking for a flavorful twist.
items.simplified_description: Spicy fried rice with chicken and vegetables in Schezwan sauce.
